function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — resending the requested invoice from 2026-03-26 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH), attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; checklist appears satisfied (single attachment read earlier, ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity, subject quoting valid). Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md for Nina with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed successfully: processed the only/oldest inbox item, drafted resend email with verified recipient and exact invoice attachment, then removed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing its requested resend workflow.

function.message: Completed. I worked the oldest inbox message by processing 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md, verified sender identity against the canonical entity record, created an outbound email draft with the requested 2026-03-26 Nordstern invoice attached, and then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read required system workflows for inbox + email handling, used canonical inbox email header and canonical entity primary_contact_email for identity matching, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows the inbox request asked for invoice dated 2026-03-26 from Nordstern; canonical sender from header matched 10_entities/cast/nina.md primary_contact_email; exact invoice record exists at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md; outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with that attachment, then inbox item was removed per workflow.
